name: fleet-commander
title: Fleet Commander
author: Player
description: Automates space platform fleets using name and number matching. Ships sharing a text prefix (e.g. "Cargo 1", "Cargo 2") are grouped into a fleet; the platform numbered 1 is the Leader and its schedule, logistics requests, and physical build are automatically mirrored to every follower. New platforms are auto-named and auto-synced on creation. Runs entirely headless via event hooks.
